name: maestro
description: Maestro Frontier orchestration, catalog-first model-panel composition, Codex skills, and lifecycle hooks.

interface.shortDescription: Frontier panel composition, Codex skills, and lifecycle hooks
interface.longDescription: Install Maestro in Codex as a plugin: direct /maestro slash hub to compose or choose a model panel from the Frontier catalog, bundled skills, trusted hooks, and the local read-only Frontier fusion engine.
